appearance.hair: brown hair like her father, tied up in a ponytail
appearance.face: bright brown eyes, curious and lively face
appearance.outfit: practical travel clothes — short coat, long skirt, boots
appearance.notable: leather bag on shoulder (herb bundles and ledger)

personality.behavior_pattern: Bright and chatty merchant's daughter. Good with people and well-informed. Takes care of her father.
personality.speech_style: Lively and friendly manner of speaking. Readily expresses gratitude.
personality.motivation: Arrive safely in Karendel with her father. Successful trading.

relationships.hallan: Father. Worried about him but respects him.

saiki.description: Adventurer who rescued them. Favorable impression.

history.reason: 루세나의 마차 탑승과 경계에 대한 대화

travel.origin_note: A small fishing port in southeastern Ersia. Heading north along the trade road to Karendel with textiles and dried fish.

key_events: Rescued from wolves by the party.
Saw Saiki touching sage but asked casually, dispelling suspicion.
